TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_nipaluma-alilulu,_alilolo, title = nipaluma-alilulu,_alilolo, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/nipaluma-alilulu,_alilolo} }

S.FORM: == alilulu, alilolo ÁÉŹś°ē == masa dumaay a ngangan Sapium sebiferum Roxb. (mitesekay a ngangan)Sapium sebiferum Roxb. Ś§ßśąüÁßĎ (sapamataan a ngangan)Euphorbiaceae ÁÉŹś°ēŚĪ¨ (mikeliday a nagangan)Alilolo a langawan (tada ngangan)u-guoo-shuh, lah-you-shuh, muh-tzyy-shuh, chyong-tzyy-shuh, jiuann-tzyy-shuh, muh-lah-shuh, muh-you-shuh, mhu-jang-shuh, horng-shuh, loh-shuh. Chinese Tallow Tree (ing a ngangan)Chinese Tallow Tree ŚłÉŤĺ≤ Panduan Hazam Tu Lukis,śííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ Alilolo,ťĄí Capai Tan'a'a,ŚćĎŚćó Palratri',ť≠ĮŚáĪ Alragu (kamu nu binacadan)BununŚłÉŤĺ≤ Panduan Hazam Tu Lukis,SakidayaśííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ Alilolo,Co ťĄí Capai Tan'a'a,PiwmaŚćĎŚćó Palratri',Lukayť≠ĮŚáĪ Alragu (midaduay nu binacadan)Bunun, Sakidaya, Co, Piwma, Lukay kaliwasak nu langaw maudip itni i Taywan Yi-lan, Tuing, Taycuo, Taynan a buyuan, dadan atu depadepadan maadih ku langaw. (kamu nu Hulam: .) sasapayuan isanek han, kala sicesicedaman, sapi' dihku, idaw ku ledek, mihepec tu nanum nu bili, mipatay tu cilekay, micepcep tu puces, angangan nu sasapayuan han sakay lebawaw nu bili, masa alitaday nu udip, caay tai', masilal a bibusi, mapuces, masilal, kalatan nu bau, adada nu cacebuan nu tatayna,mapudac ku banges, mabutus nu adadaan. (kamu nu Hulam: .) milihida tu langaw musakamu alilolo han u dah jii a langawan alilulu a langawan u mahetikay ku papah a tabakiay nu kilangan, langaw nu kilang han u paduh nida kala abuabuwan ku kulit, i pabaw mabalad ku nika pelaan, maikes satu tulak saku paduh. cacay nu papahan masasuala tu akaway, papah han mahida u tatipeluk masadid masadicem, tanayu han makaala tu pitu a cong-fen, ahebal han makaala tu sepatay a cong-fen, akaway nu papahan tusa a cong-fen, idaw ku tusaay hahanhanan sapatahekal tu cemed, mapulung atu puduh maudip. papah han kala lumenian kuni ka langdawan, papah nu nikudan han kala sulisulidawan, katukuhan i balangbangan nudemiadan masumad ku papah kala sumanahan. (kamu nu Hulam: .) tulu ‚Äď enem a buladan sibalu tu kalawlawan a kulid nu adidiay a baluan, balu han siakaway, i akawayan siadidiay nu balu idaw ku akaway, sipakay sasa tapabaw sa kuni ka cebalan nu balu, balu nu tunduh han u tamaan nu balu, siakawaya a balu han u taynaan a baluan. siwa- sabaw tu cacay a buladan siheci mahida u mali pela' sananay ku heci nida, adidi ku heci makaala tu 0.5-1.5 congfen, naw langdaw henay hamaw sa a mala lumeni'ay a heci, ilabu idaw ku tuluay nu sanglacay a papa'nuan. (kamu nu Hulam:9-11 .) picidekan nu langawan mahetikay nu papah a talakaway nu kilangan, talakaw han makaala tu sabaw tu lima a cong-chyy, nai' ku banuh, sicica', kala lumelumenian ku paduh nu kilang, mabalad kunika pelaan, akaway ahebal. (kamu nu Hulam: ,śúČÁłĪŤ£ā.śěĚŚĽ£ŚĪē.) papah masasuala tu akaway, masadecem, makimulmul kunika diceman, tungduh nu papah masadicem, balangbangan han hamaw sa a sumanah, kamakamaan, kiyukiyuan, hese, tesek nu langadaw atu maminan a langdawan nu kulitan, alahican nu cacaya a papahan yadah ku kulid. balu cacay ku batac nu akaway misiketay tu balu, masasuala tu akaway, mapulung i tungduh ku balu amasilac, kalawlawan langdawan ku kulit nu adidiay a mahida u tipus kuni kasihecian, itini i sadingsing amasa balu. (kamu nu Hulam:ŤĎČšļíÁĒü,ŚĎąŤŹĪŚĹĘ, .) pela'sa ku heci i langaw langdaw ku kulit, sanglacay mahida u mali ku heci, maduhem satu lumeni', pala'sa mala tulu kuni ka papelaan. pa'nuhan mahida mamulmulay, ihekal han matabu nu lacik sisa pacebaay nu pa'nu. (kamu nu Hulam: .) sapihica jong-gwo a alilolo u sakaudip nuheni sisa paluma kuniheni nu matenesay tu makaala tu pinaay a malebut nu likisian, angangn han u heka nu panu' matabu nu lacik, sisa taneng a sangaan tu lacik. panu' han u si simalacatu, taneng a sangaan tu sabun. u papahan han taneng mala sasapayuan, itini nu binawlanan han saka nikalatan nu siledekay a bau, mihepec tuni kabutus nu bili. alilolo taneng a sangaan tu chair-yoy. sadingsing masumad ku papah, ayda han u aadihan satu ku langaw, mala dadanay nu kilalidungan hinaadih kita i dadanan. (kamu nu Hulam: .) duma satu, alilolo atekak ku caang, kapah a sangaan tu nalimaan a tuu'd, sasangaan tu tuu'd dan a cancanan. alilolo a heci sangaan tu sasimalan taneng a sangaan tu nalimaan tu hcair-you. (kamu nu Hulam:ŚŹ¶Ś§Ė, .) alilolo alangaw u budawan yu mahida nu malukay henay a zitay, caay henay ka kapah kuni ka udip nu katuuday. sisa, tawyaay a zitay, alilolo han u idaway nu sakaudip a langawan i tawya. tawyaay a tademaw matineng tu mialatu alilolo nu cica' misanga tu sapipatay tu cilekay a sasapayuan. (kamu nu Hulam: .) tawya inai henay ku dinki nu katuuday, katukuh tu labii u simal tu ku sapi takelal tu luma, yumahida namaka ni adupan tu cancanan ku alan tu sasimalan, Alilolo nu heci atu padu nu hekal mataabu nu lacik ku panuan. (kamu nu Hulam: .) tawyaay a tademaw matineng tu miala tu lacik sasangaan tu sakay lumaay a tuudan, patinaku sa saka takelal nu luma' atu sapipaypay nu lacikan, atu sasangaan tu sapibaca' tu dikuc a sabung. (kamu nu Hulam: .) alilolo nu papah taneng sapicengel tu dawa, sisa , langdaway a papah sapicengelac tu dawa, alilolo a papah taneng mala lumeniay a sipicengel tu dawaan. u cica' nida sipisanga tu sapipatayaw tu cilekay, alilolo nu papah taneng amin sangaan tu sapipatay tu cilekay atu sapipatay tu lutukan. dumasatu, alilolo nu heci idaw ku yadahay nu sasimalan, yu mahidaay nu Jong-gwo tahlu han idawtu ku palumatu tu alilolo saka silaculan tu sasangan nu simal a kilangan. namahida, youtun-shuh, hetaw-shuh atu youchar-shuh sa malacad atu alilolo yadah ku sisimal nu lalangan. alilolo a pa'nu nani hetecan satu sasimalan, mala nu tademawan nu labiiay a sakatakelalan nu lumaay a simal, taneng a sangaan tu sapipingki. (kamu nu Hulam: .) sisa, nihedecan tu sasimal nu labul, caay sipibakahi, u sadameken ku labul mala sadamekan nu langaw a cancanan. alilolo micidek ku adekak nu caang, sisa saduhepicen nuheni hacacay han nuheni amicikcik tu duhepicay a kasuyan, sangaan tu kakaydihan tu tuud sasangaan tu kakaydihan tu elun, atu tatipeluk mala sasulitan numita. taneng sangaan tu culen. namahida satu, paluma tu budu' nu palumaay tu budu' a kilangaan namahida taneng misanga tu alukulu, kanyou, lacik a tatipeluk, youmou atu bangsisay a tuud. (kamu nu Hulam: .) alilolo namaka lamid katukuh tu papah u budawan namin kya kilang, sakapah han ami sahica. aydaay a zitay masumadtu yadah tunipi kinkiw tu cancanan, yadahtu ku huah-shyue a tuud kumikutaya tu cancanan, sisa aydaay a alilolo, u aadihan satu i aadihan atu sakay dadanan satu amaadi kina langaw. u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika
S.PHON: == ar~…ĺir~…ĺur~…ĺu, ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo ** == masa dumaaj a ŇčaŇčan sapium s…ôbif…ôrum *o*b. (mit…ôs…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan)sapium s…ôbif…ôrum *o*b. *** (sapamataan a ŇčaŇčan)…ôupńßorbia ¶…ôa…ô *** (mik…ôr~…ĺidaj a nagaŇčan)ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo a r~…ĺaŇčawan (tada ŇčaŇčan)u-guoo-sńßuńß, r~…ĺańß-jou-sńßuńß, muńß-tzjj-sńßuńß, ¶ńßjoŇč-tzjj-sńßuńß, jiuann-tzjj-sńßuńß, muńß-r~…ĺańß-sńßuńß, muńß-jou-sńßuńß, mńßu-jaŇč-sńßuńß, ńßorŇč-sńßuńß, r~…ĺońß-sńßuńß. ¶ńßin…ôs…ô tar~…ĺr~…ĺow tr…ô…ô (iŇč a ŇčaŇčan) ¶ńßin…ôs…ô tar~…ĺr~…ĺow tr…ô…ô ** panduan ńßazam tu r~…ĺukis,**** ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo,* ¶apai tan Ē~ °a Ē~ °a,** par~…ĺratri Ē~ °,** ar~…ĺragu (kamu nu bina ¶adan)bunun** panduan ńßazam tu r~…ĺukis,sakidaja**** ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo, ¶o * ¶apai tan Ē~ °a Ē~ °a,piwma** par~…ĺratri Ē~ °,r~…ĺukaj** ar~…ĺragu (midaduaj nu bina ¶adan)bunun, sakidaja, ¶o, piwma, r~…ĺukaj kar~…ĺiwasak nu r~…ĺaŇčaw maudip itni i tajwan ji-r~…ĺan, tuiŇč, taj ¶uo, tajnan a bujuan, dadan atu d…ôpad…ôpadan maadińß ku r~…ĺaŇčaw. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) sasapajuan isan…ôk ńßan, kar~…ĺa si ¶…ôsi ¶…ôdaman, sapi Ē~ ° dińßku, idaw ku r~…ĺ…ôd…ôk, mińß…ôp…ô ¶ tu nanum nu bir~…ĺi, mipataj tu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj, mi ¶…ôp ¶…ôp tu pu ¶…ôs, aŇčaŇčan nu sasapajuan ńßan sakaj r~…ĺ…ôbawaw nu bir~…ĺi, masa ar~…ĺitadaj nu udip, ¶aaj tai Ē~ °, masir~…ĺar~…ĺ a bibusi, mapu ¶…ôs, masir~…ĺar~…ĺ, kar~…ĺatan nu bau, adada nu ¶a ¶…ôbuan nu tatajna,mapuda ¶ ku baŇč…ôs, mabutus nu adadaan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) mir~…ĺińßida tu r~…ĺaŇčaw musakamu ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo ńßan u dańß jii a r~…ĺaŇčawan ar~…ĺir~…ĺur~…ĺu a r~…ĺaŇčawan u mańß…ôtikaj ku papańß a tabakiaj nu kir~…ĺaŇčan, r~…ĺaŇčaw nu kir~…ĺaŇč ńßan u paduńß nida kar~…ĺa abuabuwan ku kur~…ĺit, i pabaw mabar~…ĺad ku nika p…ôr~…ĺaan, maik…ôs satu tur~…ĺak saku paduńß. ¶a ¶aj nu papańßan masasuar~…ĺa tu akawaj, papańß ńßan mańßida u tatip…ôr~…ĺuk masadid masadi ¶…ôm, tanaju ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu pitu a ¶oŇč-f…ôn, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu s…ôpataj a ¶oŇč-f…ôn, akawaj nu papańßan tusa a ¶oŇč-f…ôn, idaw ku tusaaj ńßańßanńßanan sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu ¶…ôm…ôd, mapur~…ĺuŇč atu puduńß maudip. papańß ńßan kar~…ĺa r~…ĺum…ônian kuni ka r~…ĺaŇčdawan, papańß nu nikudan ńßan kar~…ĺa sur~…ĺisur~…ĺidawan, katukuńßan i bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan nud…ômiadan masumad ku papańß kar~…ĺa sumanańßan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) tur~…ĺu * …ôn…ôm a bur~…ĺadan sibar~…ĺu tu kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan a kur~…ĺid nu adidiaj a bar~…ĺuan, bar~…ĺu ńßan siakawaj, i akawajan siadidiaj nu bar~…ĺu idaw ku akawaj, sipakaj sasa tapabaw sa kuni ka ¶…ôbar~…ĺan nu bar~…ĺu, bar~…ĺu nu tunduńß ńßan u tamaan nu bar~…ĺu, siakawaja a bar~…ĺu ńßan u tajnaan a bar~…ĺuan. siwa- sabaw tu ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺadan sińß…ô ¶i mańßida u mar~…ĺi p…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ ° sananaj ku ńß…ô ¶i nida, adidi ku ńß…ô ¶i makaar~…ĺa tu *.*-*.* ¶oŇčf…ôn, naw r~…ĺaŇčdaw ńß…ônaj ńßamaw sa a mar~…ĺa r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj a ńß…ô ¶i, ir~…ĺabu idaw ku tur~…ĺuaj nu saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a papa Ē~ °nuan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam:*-** .) pi ¶id…ôkan nu r~…ĺaŇčawan mańß…ôtikaj nu papańß a tar~…ĺakawaj nu kir~…ĺaŇčan, tar~…ĺakaw ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu sabaw tu r~…ĺima a ¶oŇč- ¶ńßjj, nai Ē~ ° ku banuńß, si ¶i ¶a Ē~ °, kar~…ĺa r~…ĺum…ôr~…ĺum…ônian ku paduńß nu kir~…ĺaŇč, mabar~…ĺad kunika p…ôr~…ĺaan, akawaj ańß…ôbar~…ĺ. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ,***.***.) papańß masasuar~…ĺa tu akawaj, masad…ô ¶…ôm, makimur~…ĺmur~…ĺ kunika di ¶…ôman, tuŇčduńß nu papańß masadi ¶…ôm, bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan ńßan ńßamaw sa a sumanańß, kamakamaan, kijukijuan, ńß…ôs…ô, t…ôs…ôk nu r~…ĺaŇčadaw atu maminan a r~…ĺaŇčdawan nu kur~…ĺitan, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an nu ¶a ¶aja a papańßan jadańß ku kur~…ĺid. bar~…ĺu ¶a ¶aj ku bata ¶ nu akawaj misik…ôtaj tu bar~…ĺu, masasuar~…ĺa tu akawaj, mapur~…ĺuŇč i tuŇčduńß ku bar~…ĺu amasir~…ĺa ¶, kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan r~…ĺaŇčdawan ku kur~…ĺit nu adidiaj a mańßida u tipus kuni kasińß…ô ¶ian, itini i sadiŇčsiŇč amasa bar~…ĺu. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam:***,***, .) p…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ °sa ku ńß…ô ¶i i r~…ĺaŇčaw r~…ĺaŇčdaw ku kur~…ĺit, saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj mańßida u mar~…ĺi ku ńß…ô ¶i, maduńß…ôm satu r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °, par~…ĺa Ē~ °sa mar~…ĺa tur~…ĺu kuni ka pap…ôr~…ĺaan. pa Ē~ °nuńßan mańßida mamur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj, ińß…ôkar~…ĺ ńßan matabu nu r~…ĺa ¶ik sisa pa ¶…ôbaaj nu pa Ē~ °nu. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) sapińßi ¶a joŇč-gwo a ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo u sakaudip nuńß…ôni sisa par~…ĺuma kunińß…ôni nu mat…ôn…ôsaj tu makaar~…ĺa tu pinaaj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut nu r~…ĺikisian, aŇčaŇčn ńßan u ńß…ôka nu panu Ē~ ° matabu nu r~…ĺa ¶ik, sisa tan…ôŇč a saŇčaan tu r~…ĺa ¶ik. panu Ē~ ° ńßan u si simar~…ĺa ¶atu, tan…ôŇč a saŇčaan tu sabun. u papańßan ńßan tan…ôŇč mar~…ĺa sasapajuan, itini nu binawr~…ĺanan ńßan saka nikar~…ĺatan nu sir~…ĺ…ôd…ôkaj a bau, mińß…ôp…ô ¶ tuni kabutus nu bir~…ĺi. ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo tan…ôŇč a saŇčaan tu ¶ńßair-joj. sadiŇčsiŇč masumad ku papańß, ajda ńßan u aadińßan satu ku r~…ĺaŇčaw, mar~…ĺa dadanaj nu kir~…ĺar~…ĺiduŇčan ńßinaadińß kita i dadanan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) duma satu, ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo at…ôkak ku ¶aaŇč, kapańß a saŇčaan tu nar~…ĺimaan a tuu Ē~ °d, sasaŇčaan tu tuu Ē~ °d dan a ¶an ¶anan. ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo a ńß…ô ¶i saŇčaan tu sasimar~…ĺan tan…ôŇč a saŇčaan tu nar~…ĺimaan tu ńß ¶air-jou. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam:**, .) ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo ar~…ĺaŇčaw u budawan ju mańßida nu mar~…ĺukaj ńß…ônaj a zitaj, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj ka kapańß kuni ka udip nu katuudaj. sisa, tawjaaj a zitaj, ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo ńßan u idawaj nu sakaudip a r~…ĺaŇčawan i tawja. tawjaaj a tad…ômaw matin…ôŇč tu miar~…ĺatu ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo nu ¶i ¶a Ē~ ° misaŇča tu sapipataj tu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj a sasapajuan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) tawja inai ńß…ônaj ku dinki nu katuudaj, katukuńß tu r~…ĺabii u simar~…ĺ tu ku sapi tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ tu r~…ĺuma, jumańßida namaka ni adupan tu ¶an ¶anan ku ar~…ĺan tu sasimar~…ĺan, ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo nu ńß…ô ¶i atu padu nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ mataabu nu r~…ĺa ¶ik ku panuan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) tawjaaj a tad…ômaw matin…ôŇč tu miar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺa ¶ik sasaŇčaan tu sakaj r~…ĺumaaj a tuudan, patinaku sa saka tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° atu sapipajpaj nu r~…ĺa ¶ikan, atu sasaŇčaan tu sapiba ¶a Ē~ ° tu diku ¶ a sabuŇč. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo nu papańß tan…ôŇč sapi ¶…ôŇč…ôr~…ĺ tu dawa, sisa , r~…ĺaŇčdawaj a papańß sapi ¶…ôŇč…ôr~…ĺa ¶ tu dawa, ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo a papańß tan…ôŇč mar~…ĺa r~…ĺum…ôniaj a sipi ¶…ôŇč…ôr~…ĺ tu dawaan. u ¶i ¶a Ē~ ° nida sipisaŇča tu sapipatajaw tu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj, ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo nu papańß tan…ôŇč amin saŇčaan tu sapipataj tu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj atu sapipataj tu r~…ĺutukan. dumasatu, ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo nu ńß…ô ¶i idaw ku jadańßaj nu sasimar~…ĺan, ju mańßidaaj nu *oŇč-gwo tańßr~…ĺu ńßan idawtu ku par~…ĺumatu tu ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo saka sir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan tu sasaŇčan nu simar~…ĺ a kir~…ĺaŇčan. namańßida, joutun-sńßuńß, ńß…ôtaw-sńßuńß atu jou ¶ńßar-sńßuńß sa mar~…ĺa ¶ad atu ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo jadańß ku sisimar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčan. ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo a pa Ē~ °nu nani ńß…ôt…ô ¶an satu sasimar~…ĺan, mar~…ĺa nu tad…ômawan nu r~…ĺabiiaj a sakatak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺan nu r~…ĺumaaj a simar~…ĺ, tan…ôŇč a saŇčaan tu sapipiŇčki. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) sisa, nińß…ôd…ô ¶an tu sasimar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺabur~…ĺ, ¶aaj sipibakańßi, u sadam…ôk…ôn ku r~…ĺabur~…ĺ mar~…ĺa sadam…ôkan nu r~…ĺaŇčaw a ¶an ¶anan. ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo mi ¶id…ôk ku ad…ôkak nu ¶aaŇč, sisa saduńß…ôpi ¶…ôn nuńß…ôni ńßa ¶a ¶aj ńßan nuńß…ôni ami ¶ik ¶ik tu duńß…ôpi ¶aj a kasujan, saŇčaan tu kakajdińßan tu tuud sasaŇčaan tu kakajdińßan tu …ôr~…ĺun, atu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk mar~…ĺa sasur~…ĺitan numita. tan…ôŇč saŇčaan tu ¶ur~…ĺ…ôn. namańßida satu, par~…ĺuma tu budu Ē~ ° nu par~…ĺumaaj tu budu Ē~ ° a kir~…ĺaŇčaan namańßida tan…ôŇč misaŇča tu ar~…ĺukur~…ĺu, kanjou, r~…ĺa ¶ik a tatip…ôr~…ĺuk, joumou atu baŇčsisaj a tuud. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo namaka r~…ĺamid katukuńß tu papańß u budawan namin kja kir~…ĺaŇč, sakapańß ńßan ami sańßi ¶a. ajdaaj a zitaj masumadtu jadańß tunipi kinkiw tu ¶an ¶anan, jadańßtu ku ńßuańß-sńßju…ô a tuud kumikutaja tu ¶an ¶anan, sisa ajdaaj a ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo, u aadińßan satu i aadińßan atu sakaj dadanan satu amaadi kina r~…ĺaŇčaw. u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu-ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika
S.FORM: == alilulu, alilolo ÁÉŹś°ē == masa dumaay a ngangan Sapium sebiferum Roxb. (mitesekay a ngangan)Sapium sebiferum Roxb. Ś§ßśąüÁßĎ (sapamataan a ngangan)Euphorbiaceae ÁÉŹś°ēŚĪ¨ (mikeliday a nagangan)Alilolo a langawan (tada ngangan)u-guoo-shuh, lah-you-shuh, muh-tzyy-shuh, chyong-tzyy-shuh, jiuann-tzyy-shuh, muh-lah-shuh, muh-you-shuh, mhu-jang-shuh, horng-shuh, loh-shuh. Chinese Tallow Tree (ing a ngangan)Chinese Tallow Tree ŚłÉŤĺ≤ Panduan Hazam Tu Lukis,śííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ Alilolo,ťĄí Capai Tan'a'a,ŚćĎŚćó Palratri',ť≠ĮŚáĪ Alragu (kamu nu binacadan)BununŚłÉŤĺ≤ Panduan Hazam Tu Lukis,SakidayaśííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ Alilolo,Co ťĄí Capai Tan'a'a,PiwmaŚćĎŚćó Palratri',Lukayť≠ĮŚáĪ Alragu (midaduay nu binacadan)Bunun, Sakidaya, Co, Piwma, Lukay kaliwasak nu langaw maudip itni i Taywan Yi-lan, Tuing, Taycuo, Taynan a buyuan, dadan atu depadepadan maadih ku langaw. (kamu nu Hulam: .) sasapayuan isanek han, kala sicesicedaman, sapi' dihku, idaw ku ledek, mihepec tu nanum nu bili, mipatay tu cilekay, micepcep tu puces, angangan nu sasapayuan han sakay lebawaw nu bili, masa alitaday nu udip, caay tai', masilal a bibusi, mapuces, masilal, kalatan nu bau, adada nu cacebuan nu tatayna,mapudac ku banges, mabutus nu adadaan. (kamu nu Hulam: .) milihida tu langaw musakamu alilolo han u dah jii a langawan alilulu a langawan u mahetikay ku papah a tabakiay nu kilangan, langaw nu kilang han u paduh nida kala abuabuwan ku kulit, i pabaw mabalad ku nika pelaan, maikes satu tulak saku paduh. cacay nu papahan masasuala tu akaway, papah han mahida u tatipeluk masadid masadicem, tanayu han makaala tu pitu a cong-fen, ahebal han makaala tu sepatay a cong-fen, akaway nu papahan tusa a cong-fen, idaw ku tusaay hahanhanan sapatahekal tu cemed, mapulung atu puduh maudip. papah han kala lumenian kuni ka langdawan, papah nu nikudan han kala sulisulidawan, katukuhan i balangbangan nudemiadan masumad ku papah kala sumanahan. (kamu nu Hulam: .) tulu ‚Äď enem a buladan sibalu tu kalawlawan a kulid nu adidiay a baluan, balu han siakaway, i akawayan siadidiay nu balu idaw ku akaway, sipakay sasa tapabaw sa kuni ka cebalan nu balu, balu nu tunduh han u tamaan nu balu, siakawaya a balu han u taynaan a baluan. siwa- sabaw tu cacay a buladan siheci mahida u mali pela' sananay ku heci nida, adidi ku heci makaala tu 0.5-1.5 congfen, naw langdaw henay hamaw sa a mala lumeni'ay a heci, ilabu idaw ku tuluay nu sanglacay a papa'nuan. (kamu nu Hulam:9-11 .) picidekan nu langawan mahetikay nu papah a talakaway nu kilangan, talakaw han makaala tu sabaw tu lima a cong-chyy, nai' ku banuh, sicica', kala lumelumenian ku paduh nu kilang, mabalad kunika pelaan, akaway ahebal. (kamu nu Hulam: ,śúČÁłĪŤ£ā.śěĚŚĽ£ŚĪē.) papah masasuala tu akaway, masadecem, makimulmul kunika diceman, tungduh nu papah masadicem, balangbangan han hamaw sa a sumanah, kamakamaan, kiyukiyuan, hese, tesek nu langadaw atu maminan a langdawan nu kulitan, alahican nu cacaya a papahan yadah ku kulid. balu cacay ku batac nu akaway misiketay tu balu, masasuala tu akaway, mapulung i tungduh ku balu amasilac, kalawlawan langdawan ku kulit nu adidiay a mahida u tipus kuni kasihecian, itini i sadingsing amasa balu. (kamu nu Hulam:ŤĎČšļíÁĒü,ŚĎąŤŹĪŚĹĘ, .) pela'sa ku heci i langaw langdaw ku kulit, sanglacay mahida u mali ku heci, maduhem satu lumeni', pala'sa mala tulu kuni ka papelaan. pa'nuhan mahida mamulmulay, ihekal han matabu nu lacik sisa pacebaay nu pa'nu. (kamu nu Hulam: .) sapihica jong-gwo a alilolo u sakaudip nuheni sisa paluma kuniheni nu matenesay tu makaala tu pinaay a malebut nu likisian, angangn han u heka nu panu' matabu nu lacik, sisa taneng a sangaan tu lacik. panu' han u si simalacatu, taneng a sangaan tu sabun. u papahan han taneng mala sasapayuan, itini nu binawlanan han saka nikalatan nu siledekay a bau, mihepec tuni kabutus nu bili. alilolo taneng a sangaan tu chair-yoy. sadingsing masumad ku papah, ayda han u aadihan satu ku langaw, mala dadanay nu kilalidungan hinaadih kita i dadanan. (kamu nu Hulam: .) duma satu, alilolo atekak ku caang, kapah a sangaan tu nalimaan a tuu'd, sasangaan tu tuu'd dan a cancanan. alilolo a heci sangaan tu sasimalan taneng a sangaan tu nalimaan tu hcair-you. (kamu nu Hulam:ŚŹ¶Ś§Ė, .) alilolo alangaw u budawan yu mahida nu malukay henay a zitay, caay henay ka kapah kuni ka udip nu katuuday. sisa, tawyaay a zitay, alilolo han u idaway nu sakaudip a langawan i tawya. tawyaay a tademaw matineng tu mialatu alilolo nu cica' misanga tu sapipatay tu cilekay a sasapayuan. (kamu nu Hulam: .) tawya inai henay ku dinki nu katuuday, katukuh tu labii u simal tu ku sapi takelal tu luma, yumahida namaka ni adupan tu cancanan ku alan tu sasimalan, Alilolo nu heci atu padu nu hekal mataabu nu lacik ku panuan. (kamu nu Hulam: .) tawyaay a tademaw matineng tu miala tu lacik sasangaan tu sakay lumaay a tuudan, patinaku sa saka takelal nu luma' atu sapipaypay nu lacikan, atu sasangaan tu sapibaca' tu dikuc a sabung. (kamu nu Hulam: .) alilolo nu papah taneng sapicengel tu dawa, sisa , langdaway a papah sapicengelac tu dawa, alilolo a papah taneng mala lumeniay a sipicengel tu dawaan. u cica' nida sipisanga tu sapipatayaw tu cilekay, alilolo nu papah taneng amin sangaan tu sapipatay tu cilekay atu sapipatay tu lutukan. dumasatu, alilolo nu heci idaw ku yadahay nu sasimalan, yu mahidaay nu Jong-gwo tahlu han idawtu ku palumatu tu alilolo saka silaculan tu sasangan nu simal a kilangan. namahida, youtun-shuh, hetaw-shuh atu youchar-shuh sa malacad atu alilolo yadah ku sisimal nu lalangan. alilolo a pa'nu nani hetecan satu sasimalan, mala nu tademawan nu labiiay a sakatakelalan nu lumaay a simal, taneng a sangaan tu sapipingki. (kamu nu Hulam: .) sisa, nihedecan tu sasimal nu labul, caay sipibakahi, u sadameken ku labul mala sadamekan nu langaw a cancanan. alilolo micidek ku adekak nu caang, sisa saduhepicen nuheni hacacay han nuheni amicikcik tu duhepicay a kasuyan, sangaan tu kakaydihan tu tuud sasangaan tu kakaydihan tu elun, atu tatipeluk mala sasulitan numita. taneng sangaan tu culen. namahida satu, paluma tu budu' nu palumaay tu budu' a kilangaan namahida taneng misanga tu alukulu, kanyou, lacik a tatipeluk, youmou atu bangsisay a tuud. (kamu nu Hulam: .) alilolo namaka lamid katukuh tu papah u budawan namin kya kilang, sakapah han ami sahica. aydaay a zitay masumadtu yadah tunipi kinkiw tu cancanan, yadahtu ku huah-shyue a tuud kumikutaya tu cancanan, sisa aydaay a alilolo, u aadihan satu i aadihan atu sakay dadanan satu amaadi kina langaw. u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika
S.PHON: == ar~…ĺir~…ĺur~…ĺu, ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo ** == masa dumaaj a ŇčaŇčan sapium s…ôbif…ôrum *o*b. (mit…ôs…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan)sapium s…ôbif…ôrum *o*b. *** (sapamataan a ŇčaŇčan)…ôupńßorbia ¶…ôa…ô *** (mik…ôr~…ĺidaj a nagaŇčan)ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo a r~…ĺaŇčawan (tada ŇčaŇčan)u-guoo-sńßuńß, r~…ĺańß-jou-sńßuńß, muńß-tzjj-sńßuńß, ¶ńßjoŇč-tzjj-sńßuńß, jiuann-tzjj-sńßuńß, muńß-r~…ĺańß-sńßuńß, muńß-jou-sńßuńß, mńßu-jaŇč-sńßuńß, ńßorŇč-sńßuńß, r~…ĺońß-sńßuńß. ¶ńßin…ôs…ô tar~…ĺr~…ĺow tr…ô…ô (iŇč a ŇčaŇčan) ¶ńßin…ôs…ô tar~…ĺr~…ĺow tr…ô…ô ** panduan ńßazam tu r~…ĺukis,**** ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo,* ¶apai tan Ē~ °a Ē~ °a,** par~…ĺratri Ē~ °,** ar~…ĺragu (kamu nu bina ¶adan)bunun** panduan ńßazam tu r~…ĺukis,sakidaja**** ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo, ¶o * ¶apai tan Ē~ °a Ē~ °a,piwma** par~…ĺratri Ē~ °,r~…ĺukaj** ar~…ĺragu (midaduaj nu bina ¶adan)bunun, sakidaja, ¶o, piwma, r~…ĺukaj kar~…ĺiwasak nu r~…ĺaŇčaw maudip itni i tajwan ji-r~…ĺan, tuiŇč, taj ¶uo, tajnan a bujuan, dadan atu d…ôpad…ôpadan maadińß ku r~…ĺaŇčaw. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) sasapajuan isan…ôk ńßan, kar~…ĺa si ¶…ôsi ¶…ôdaman, sapi Ē~ ° dińßku, idaw ku r~…ĺ…ôd…ôk, mińß…ôp…ô ¶ tu nanum nu bir~…ĺi, mipataj tu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj, mi ¶…ôp ¶…ôp tu pu ¶…ôs, aŇčaŇčan nu sasapajuan ńßan sakaj r~…ĺ…ôbawaw nu bir~…ĺi, masa ar~…ĺitadaj nu udip, ¶aaj tai Ē~ °, masir~…ĺar~…ĺ a bibusi, mapu ¶…ôs, masir~…ĺar~…ĺ, kar~…ĺatan nu bau, adada nu ¶a ¶…ôbuan nu tatajna,mapuda ¶ ku baŇč…ôs, mabutus nu adadaan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) mir~…ĺińßida tu r~…ĺaŇčaw musakamu ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo ńßan u dańß jii a r~…ĺaŇčawan ar~…ĺir~…ĺur~…ĺu a r~…ĺaŇčawan u mańß…ôtikaj ku papańß a tabakiaj nu kir~…ĺaŇčan, r~…ĺaŇčaw nu kir~…ĺaŇč ńßan u paduńß nida kar~…ĺa abuabuwan ku kur~…ĺit, i pabaw mabar~…ĺad ku nika p…ôr~…ĺaan, maik…ôs satu tur~…ĺak saku paduńß. ¶a ¶aj nu papańßan masasuar~…ĺa tu akawaj, papańß ńßan mańßida u tatip…ôr~…ĺuk masadid masadi ¶…ôm, tanaju ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu pitu a ¶oŇč-f…ôn, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu s…ôpataj a ¶oŇč-f…ôn, akawaj nu papańßan tusa a ¶oŇč-f…ôn, idaw ku tusaaj ńßańßanńßanan sapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu ¶…ôm…ôd, mapur~…ĺuŇč atu puduńß maudip. papańß ńßan kar~…ĺa r~…ĺum…ônian kuni ka r~…ĺaŇčdawan, papańß nu nikudan ńßan kar~…ĺa sur~…ĺisur~…ĺidawan, katukuńßan i bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan nud…ômiadan masumad ku papańß kar~…ĺa sumanańßan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) tur~…ĺu * …ôn…ôm a bur~…ĺadan sibar~…ĺu tu kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan a kur~…ĺid nu adidiaj a bar~…ĺuan, bar~…ĺu ńßan siakawaj, i akawajan siadidiaj nu bar~…ĺu idaw ku akawaj, sipakaj sasa tapabaw sa kuni ka ¶…ôbar~…ĺan nu bar~…ĺu, bar~…ĺu nu tunduńß ńßan u tamaan nu bar~…ĺu, siakawaja a bar~…ĺu ńßan u tajnaan a bar~…ĺuan. siwa- sabaw tu ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺadan sińß…ô ¶i mańßida u mar~…ĺi p…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ ° sananaj ku ńß…ô ¶i nida, adidi ku ńß…ô ¶i makaar~…ĺa tu *.*-*.* ¶oŇčf…ôn, naw r~…ĺaŇčdaw ńß…ônaj ńßamaw sa a mar~…ĺa r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj a ńß…ô ¶i, ir~…ĺabu idaw ku tur~…ĺuaj nu saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a papa Ē~ °nuan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam:*-** .) pi ¶id…ôkan nu r~…ĺaŇčawan mańß…ôtikaj nu papańß a tar~…ĺakawaj nu kir~…ĺaŇčan, tar~…ĺakaw ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu sabaw tu r~…ĺima a ¶oŇč- ¶ńßjj, nai Ē~ ° ku banuńß, si ¶i ¶a Ē~ °, kar~…ĺa r~…ĺum…ôr~…ĺum…ônian ku paduńß nu kir~…ĺaŇč, mabar~…ĺad kunika p…ôr~…ĺaan, akawaj ańß…ôbar~…ĺ. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ,***.***.) papańß masasuar~…ĺa tu akawaj, masad…ô ¶…ôm, makimur~…ĺmur~…ĺ kunika di ¶…ôman, tuŇčduńß nu papańß masadi ¶…ôm, bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan ńßan ńßamaw sa a sumanańß, kamakamaan, kijukijuan, ńß…ôs…ô, t…ôs…ôk nu r~…ĺaŇčadaw atu maminan a r~…ĺaŇčdawan nu kur~…ĺitan, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an nu ¶a ¶aja a papańßan jadańß ku kur~…ĺid. bar~…ĺu ¶a ¶aj ku bata ¶ nu akawaj misik…ôtaj tu bar~…ĺu, masasuar~…ĺa tu akawaj, mapur~…ĺuŇč i tuŇčduńß ku bar~…ĺu amasir~…ĺa ¶, kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan r~…ĺaŇčdawan ku kur~…ĺit nu adidiaj a mańßida u tipus kuni kasińß…ô ¶ian, itini i sadiŇčsiŇč amasa bar~…ĺu. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam:***,***, .) p…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ °sa ku ńß…ô ¶i i r~…ĺaŇčaw r~…ĺaŇčdaw ku kur~…ĺit, saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj mańßida u mar~…ĺi ku ńß…ô ¶i, maduńß…ôm satu r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °, par~…ĺa Ē~ °sa mar~…ĺa tur~…ĺu kuni ka pap…ôr~…ĺaan. pa Ē~ °nuńßan mańßida mamur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj, ińß…ôkar~…ĺ ńßan matabu nu r~…ĺa ¶ik sisa pa ¶…ôbaaj nu pa Ē~ °nu. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) sapińßi ¶a joŇč-gwo a ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo u sakaudip nuńß…ôni sisa par~…ĺuma kunińß…ôni nu mat…ôn…ôsaj tu makaar~…ĺa tu pinaaj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut nu r~…ĺikisian, aŇčaŇčn ńßan u ńß…ôka nu panu Ē~ ° matabu nu r~…ĺa ¶ik, sisa tan…ôŇč a saŇčaan tu r~…ĺa ¶ik. panu Ē~ ° ńßan u si simar~…ĺa ¶atu, tan…ôŇč a saŇčaan tu sabun. u papańßan ńßan tan…ôŇč mar~…ĺa sasapajuan, itini nu binawr~…ĺanan ńßan saka nikar~…ĺatan nu sir~…ĺ…ôd…ôkaj a bau, mińß…ôp…ô ¶ tuni kabutus nu bir~…ĺi. ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo tan…ôŇč a saŇčaan tu ¶ńßair-joj. sadiŇčsiŇč masumad ku papańß, ajda ńßan u aadińßan satu ku r~…ĺaŇčaw, mar~…ĺa dadanaj nu kir~…ĺar~…ĺiduŇčan ńßinaadińß kita i dadanan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) duma satu, ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo at…ôkak ku ¶aaŇč, kapańß a saŇčaan tu nar~…ĺimaan a tuu Ē~ °d, sasaŇčaan tu tuu Ē~ °d dan a ¶an ¶anan. ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo a ńß…ô ¶i saŇčaan tu sasimar~…ĺan tan…ôŇč a saŇčaan tu nar~…ĺimaan tu ńß ¶air-jou. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam:**, .) ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo ar~…ĺaŇčaw u budawan ju mańßida nu mar~…ĺukaj ńß…ônaj a zitaj, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj ka kapańß kuni ka udip nu katuudaj. sisa, tawjaaj a zitaj, ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo ńßan u idawaj nu sakaudip a r~…ĺaŇčawan i tawja. tawjaaj a tad…ômaw matin…ôŇč tu miar~…ĺatu ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo nu ¶i ¶a Ē~ ° misaŇča tu sapipataj tu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj a sasapajuan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) tawja inai ńß…ônaj ku dinki nu katuudaj, katukuńß tu r~…ĺabii u simar~…ĺ tu ku sapi tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ tu r~…ĺuma, jumańßida namaka ni adupan tu ¶an ¶anan ku ar~…ĺan tu sasimar~…ĺan, ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo nu ńß…ô ¶i atu padu nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ mataabu nu r~…ĺa ¶ik ku panuan. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) tawjaaj a tad…ômaw matin…ôŇč tu miar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺa ¶ik sasaŇčaan tu sakaj r~…ĺumaaj a tuudan, patinaku sa saka tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° atu sapipajpaj nu r~…ĺa ¶ikan, atu sasaŇčaan tu sapiba ¶a Ē~ ° tu diku ¶ a sabuŇč. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo nu papańß tan…ôŇč sapi ¶…ôŇč…ôr~…ĺ tu dawa, sisa , r~…ĺaŇčdawaj a papańß sapi ¶…ôŇč…ôr~…ĺa ¶ tu dawa, ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo a papańß tan…ôŇč mar~…ĺa r~…ĺum…ôniaj a sipi ¶…ôŇč…ôr~…ĺ tu dawaan. u ¶i ¶a Ē~ ° nida sipisaŇča tu sapipatajaw tu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj, ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo nu papańß tan…ôŇč amin saŇčaan tu sapipataj tu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj atu sapipataj tu r~…ĺutukan. dumasatu, ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo nu ńß…ô ¶i idaw ku jadańßaj nu sasimar~…ĺan, ju mańßidaaj nu *oŇč-gwo tańßr~…ĺu ńßan idawtu ku par~…ĺumatu tu ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo saka sir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan tu sasaŇčan nu simar~…ĺ a kir~…ĺaŇčan. namańßida, joutun-sńßuńß, ńß…ôtaw-sńßuńß atu jou ¶ńßar-sńßuńß sa mar~…ĺa ¶ad atu ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo jadańß ku sisimar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčan. ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo a pa Ē~ °nu nani ńß…ôt…ô ¶an satu sasimar~…ĺan, mar~…ĺa nu tad…ômawan nu r~…ĺabiiaj a sakatak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺan nu r~…ĺumaaj a simar~…ĺ, tan…ôŇč a saŇčaan tu sapipiŇčki. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) sisa, nińß…ôd…ô ¶an tu sasimar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺabur~…ĺ, ¶aaj sipibakańßi, u sadam…ôk…ôn ku r~…ĺabur~…ĺ mar~…ĺa sadam…ôkan nu r~…ĺaŇčaw a ¶an ¶anan. ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo mi ¶id…ôk ku ad…ôkak nu ¶aaŇč, sisa saduńß…ôpi ¶…ôn nuńß…ôni ńßa ¶a ¶aj ńßan nuńß…ôni ami ¶ik ¶ik tu duńß…ôpi ¶aj a kasujan, saŇčaan tu kakajdińßan tu tuud sasaŇčaan tu kakajdińßan tu …ôr~…ĺun, atu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk mar~…ĺa sasur~…ĺitan numita. tan…ôŇč saŇčaan tu ¶ur~…ĺ…ôn. namańßida satu, par~…ĺuma tu budu Ē~ ° nu par~…ĺumaaj tu budu Ē~ ° a kir~…ĺaŇčaan namańßida tan…ôŇč misaŇča tu ar~…ĺukur~…ĺu, kanjou, r~…ĺa ¶ik a tatip…ôr~…ĺuk, joumou atu baŇčsisaj a tuud. (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: .) ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo namaka r~…ĺamid katukuńß tu papańß u budawan namin kja kir~…ĺaŇč, sakapańß ńßan ami sańßi ¶a. ajdaaj a zitaj masumadtu jadańß tunipi kinkiw tu ¶an ¶anan, jadańßtu ku ńßuańß-sńßju…ô a tuud kumikutaja tu ¶an ¶anan, sisa ajdaaj a ar~…ĺir~…ĺor~…ĺo, u aadińßan satu i aadińßan atu sakaj dadanan satu amaadi kina r~…ĺaŇčaw. u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu-ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika
